caption: A person wearing a dark t-shirt is visible in a small picture-in-picture window in the bottom-left corner of a video game store interface. The screen displays a "STORE" menu for a football game, with various digital card packs available for purchase. Legible text across the top includes "FEATURED", "ZERO CHILL", "SELECT OFFERS", "TRAINING", "SPECIAL OFFERS", "DEAR", and "NEW". Several player cards are showcased, featuring "90+ OVR", "85+ OVR", and "84+ OVR" ratings, including a "90+ OVR ZERO CHILL PLAYER" and an "84+ OVR ALL MADDEN PLAYER". As the scene progresses, the user navigates through the store, scrolling past "HOME UNIFORM FANTASY PACK", "STADIUM FANTASY PACK", and "OFFENSE PLAYBOOK FANTASY PACK", each priced at "250". The person in the corner remains in place, looking toward the screen as the menu items shift and change position.
